$comment: Canonical GOV-2 introspection contract (RFC 7662). SHARED, byte-identical, between habitat-governance (producer, /v1/introspect) and knowledge-system (consumer, verifyAccessToken). A breaking change takes /v2 with a coexistence window. Values here are the canonical example from the GOV-2 Technical Design; tests assert the FIELD SET and shape, not literal values.

notes.expires_at: epoch seconds; null for a PAT (expires_at NULL in the tokens table)
notes.allowed_sources: current source_id strings ⊆ (grants ∩ requested); MUST be non-empty for an active token (fail-closed)
notes.token_id: opaque governance token id (gtok_ prefix) → KS AuthInfo.clientId + read-audit key
notes.inactive: unknown/revoked/expired/empty-scope → { "active": false } ONLY (RFC 7662 §2.2 — leak no other claims)
